title: Light emitting display apparatus and multi-screen display apparatus including the same
abstract: A light emitting display apparatus includes a substrate including a first region and a second region surrounded by the first region, a passivation layer disposed over the substrate, a planarization layer disposed over the passivation layer disposed in the second region of the substrate, a barrier structure disposed in the first region of the substrate, a light emitting device layer including a self-emitting device disposed over the planarization layer and the barrier structure, and an encapsulation layer including an organic encapsulation layer disposed over the light emitting device layer and at least a portion of the barrier structure, the barrier structure isolates the self-emitting device and blocks the spread of the organic encapsulation layer, at the first region of the substrate.
claims: 1. A light emitting display apparatus comprising: a substrate including a first region and a second region adjacent to the first region; a passivation layer disposed over the substrate; a planarization layer disposed over the passivation layer disposed in the second region of the substrate; a barrier structure disposed in the first region of the substrate; a light emitting device layer including a self-emitting device disposed over the planarization layer and the barrier structure; an encapsulation layer including an organic encapsulation layer disposed over the light emitting device layer and at least a portion of the barrier structure; and an auxiliary insulation layer disposed between the planarization layer and the light emitting device layer, the auxiliary insulation layer having a first portion and a second portion that is spaced apart and disconnected from the first portion in a plan view, wherein the first portion of the auxiliary insulation layer overlaps with the light emitting device layer in a plan view, wherein the barrier structure includes the second portion of the auxiliary insulation layer such that the second portion of the auxiliary insulation layer overlaps with the barrier structure in a plan view, wherein the barrier structure, in operation, blocks the spread of the organic encapsulation layer, at the first region of the substrate, wherein the barrier structure comprises: a first trench line and a second trench line configured to be disposed over the passivation layer in the first region of the substrate and including a closed loop line shape in parallel to each other, a first lower strip structure configured to be disposed over the passivation layer in the first region of the substrate and configured to be disposed between the first and second trench lines, a second lower strip structure configured to be disposed over the passivation layer in the first region of the substrate and configured to surround the second trench line, and an upper strip structure configured to be disposed over the first and second lower strip structures and including an eaves structure with respect to each of the first and second lower strip structures, wherein the self-emitting device disposed over the barrier structure is isolated by the eaves structure of the barrier structure, wherein each of the first and second lower strip structures comprises the same material as a material of the planarization layer, and wherein the upper strip structure comprises the same inorganic insulating material as an inorganic insulating material of the auxiliary insulation layer.
